productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Lascelle Black Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Lascelle combines lightweight breathable comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.UpperSynthetic upper for durability and comfortStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortBranding on the midfoot, tongue and at the back of the collarMidsoleFoam midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride and lightweight comfortOutsoleDeep grooves and a suction point for great tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
